# tgbot

> tgbot is a lightweight, strongly typed Telegram Bot API SDK for Go. Its runtime uses only the Go standard library.

## Documentation

### English

- Home: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/
- Quick start: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/guide/quick-start
- SDK client: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/sdk/client
- Long polling: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/updates/long-polling
- Webhooks: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/updates/webhook
- ext routing: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/ext/
- Errors: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/reference/errors
- API coverage: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/reference/api-coverage

### Simplified Chinese

- Home: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/
- Quick start: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/guide/quick-start
- SDK client: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/sdk/client
- Long polling: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/updates/long-polling
- Webhooks: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/updates/webhook
- ext routing: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/ext/
- Errors: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/reference/errors
- API coverage: https://tgbot.bestcheapvps.org/zh/reference/api-coverage

## Authoritative sources

- Source: https://github.com/cloudapp3/tgbot
- Go reference: https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/cloudapp3/tgbot
- Official Telegram Bot API: https://core.telegram.org/bots/api

The latest tagged tgbot release is the stable contract. Pages marked as next-release documentation may describe unreleased work and must not be treated as a stable API guarantee.
